§ 02 · Marketing
Meta Ads Management
- · Day - / -
Your Paid Ads, Explained 2-minute read - how your paid ads run inside the portal GUIDE ›

You bring the raw material, we make it sharp, we run it, and you watch the results. Here's the whole flow.

1Where your ads liveEverything paid sits under Marketing › Ads - your live campaigns, your spend, and your cost per lead.
2Request a new adHit + Add New Campaign (or Add new creative on a running one). Pick your offer, drop in your raw photos and clips with a note on the vibe, and pick your format.
3Set your spendYou set your monthly spend as the last step before you submit - and you can adjust it anytime right on the campaign. You change it, it updates - no waiting on us.
4What happens nextOur content team turns your raw assets into a polished creative, then marketing launches it on Meta. Track it under What's in flight.
5If we need youYou'll see an Action needed flag - reply right there and we keep moving.
Your First Campaign What to send us - the core videos, graphics, and how to submit GUIDE ›

Your first campaign is three angles in two formats - video and graphic. Here's what to send.

The core videos - your phone is fine
1Direct offerYou to camera, offer in the first three seconds. Two hooks if you can - one specific, one general.
2TransformationOne athlete whose progress jumps out. Before and after - they tell it, or you voice over the B-roll.
3TestimonialTwo to four parents or athletes right after a session. Use the four-question version in the Checklist.
The core graphics - send photos + words, we design
4Direct offerThe offer front and center - one strong shot, the deal, the call to action.
5TransformationBefore and after, side by side. One athlete, result obvious at a glance.
6TestimonialReal reviews, word for word, with a name and a face.
How to send it
›Marketing › Ads › Add new creative. Drag your files in (or Upload a folder), pick the format - vertical for video, Feed for graphics. Over 500MB? Drop a share link. Mark urgent if needed, submit, and watch it under What's in flight. Your spend is set as the last step.
!One rule: send raw, don't edit. The clips, the photos, the quotes. Cutting and designing is on us.

§ 02 · Marketing
Launch a new campaign.
Step 1 of 5 · Pick an offer
How to submit new ads
Quick guide

Picking the right offer below will pull up a guide card with the exact info we need from you. That guide will walk you through what kind of photos, video, and copy makes a great ad for that offer.

After you upload your assets, set a monthly spend and (optionally) link a landing page. Your account manager will review, build the campaign in Meta, and launch it within 1-2 business days.

Placeholder content. Cam will replace this with the final guide.

Pick an offer
No offers match. Create a new one below.
Create a new offer
Creation guide
Offer
Purpose
[Your account manager will fill this in. Why does this offer exist? Who's the audience? What action do we want them to take?]
Filming / creation tips
[Your account manager will fill this in. Camera angle, lighting, length, voiceover, hook in the first 3 seconds, etc.]
Example script
[Your account manager will fill this in. "Hook line in the first 3 seconds. Then the offer pitch. Then the call to action."]
Example assets
Example links
Input assets
Organize your raw assets into folders. Name each folder and drop in your assets (or a whole folder) plus any links. Our content team turns them into the finished creative.
Monthly spend
Total monthly spend across this campaign. You can adjust later from the campaign card.
Landing page (optional)
If you leave this blank, we'll send leads to your default funnel. You can change this later.
✓
Campaign request submitted
Your account manager will build the campaign and launch it within 1-2 business days.
Marketing
What do you want to work on?
Your Organic Content, Explained 2-minute read - how organic works, start to finish GUIDE ›

Organic is the content you post on your own socials. It works differently from paid ads - here's the whole flow.

1The big differenceWith ads, we build it and we launch it. With organic, we build it and hand it back to you to post. You own what goes out.
2Your monthly creditsUp top you'll see your creatives for the month (e.g. 4 of 12). Split them between video and graphics however you want. Resets the 1st, no rollover.
3Request a creativeHit Request a new creative. Drop in footage or photos, tell us the vibe and any copy, pick the format and captions. Submit - that's one off your total.
4Review and approveWhen it's done it comes back to you, marked Review. Approve it, or Request changes - that doesn't cost another credit.
5Your Creative BankApproved creatives land in your Creative Bank - download anytime and post straight to your socials.

§ 03 · Sales
Sales
Pipeline cutover (off GHL) BAM staff

Cuts this academy's sales board from GoHighLevel over to the portal's own store. The order is: start shadow (dual-write), let it soak, run reconcile until it is clean, then flip to portal. The flip is fully reversible: roll back to GHL is instant.
